Complete NowPayments payment modal component (lines 1-244) - Handles QR code display, payment address copying, status tracking - Used for deposit flow only (NOT withdrawal-specific) 2. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/ui/nowpayments-modal/index.ts`** - Export file for NowPaymentsModal component (line 1) 3. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/api/services/nowpayments-checkout.service.ts`** - NowPayments API service for creating checkouts and fetching currencies (lines 1-29) - Functions: `createCheckout()`, `getCurrencies()` --- ### Files with NowPayments Withdrawal-Specific Code 4. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/api/query-hooks/use-nowpayments-checkout.ts`** - Enum value: `NOW_PAYMENTS = "now_payments"` in `PaymentProvider` enum (line 11) - Enum value: `NOWPAYMENTS_CRYPTO = "NOWPAYMENTS_CRYPTO"` in `PaymentMethod` enum (line 25) - Map entry: `now_payments: PaymentMethod.NOWPAYMENTS_CRYPTO` (line 35) -
